key_threats: May have improved since the start of the season — 3 wins suggest capable of competitive scores
Home side (we play at Waterfront Warriors ground) — no home advantage benefit for them
key_weaknesses: NRR of -1.09 reveals systemic issues — likely struggling to chase and defend totals
6 losses from 9 games indicates brittle batting or expensive bowling, or both
Lowest-ranked Group B team WW faces until Monroe Giants in July

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Attack from ball one with Ajinkya Pradhan and Namit Rathi. Troy Titans' NRR (-1.09) shows their batting collapses under pressure. Keep them under 75 in 16 overs.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Win the toss, bat first, set 110+. Let Pradhan (17 wkts, 3.60 econ) and Yuvraj Rajpurohit (11 wkts) dismantle their middle order.
